title: Brain+ - Digital Cognitive Therapy Platform
problem: Cognitive rehabilitation for dementia and brain injury is limited, expensive, and requires in-person therapy sessions that many patients cannot access.
solution: Digital cognitive training platform using gamified exercises and AI personalization. Includes Ayla assistant for cognitive stimulation therapy.
target_customer: Dementia care providers, rehabilitation clinics, home care
regulatory_notes: Medical device classification for therapeutic claims.
varden_fit: Low — specialized cognitive therapy, not primary care infrastructure. Interesting DTx example.
notes: Danish DTx for cognitive health. Public company.
